description: This file implements the Bootstrap ScrollSpy component, which tracks scrolling and updates navigation links accordingly. It defines the ScrollSpy class, constants, and integrates with Bootstrap's utility functions and event handling.

classes.name: ScrollSpy
classes.description: A class that manages scrollspy behavior, observing sections and updating navigation links based on scroll position.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Reinitializes the target links and observable sections, and sets up the IntersectionObserver.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disconnects the observer and cleans up resources.

methods.name: _configAfterMerge
methods.description: Merges user configuration with defaults, handling deprecated options.

methods.name: _maybeEnableSmoothScroll
methods.description: Enables smooth scrolling behavior if configured.

methods.name: _getNewObserver
methods.description: Creates and returns a new IntersectionObserver with current configuration.

methods.name: _observerCallback
methods.description: Callback invoked by IntersectionObserver to update active links based on intersection entries.

methods.name: _initializeTargetsAndObservables
methods.description: Initializes the target links and observable sections based on the DOM.

methods.name: _process
methods.description: Activates a target link and updates the UI.

methods.name: _activateParents
methods.description: Activates parent elements like dropdowns and list items.

methods.name: _clearActiveClass
methods.description: Removes active classes from parent elements.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery plugin interface for the ScrollSpy component.
